provenance.derived_from: known wheel GT clips (enrichment_object=wheel, 2026-07-22, P4 Cam (dev))
provenance.method: visual localization + aggregate motion-energy heatmap on wheel GT frames
provenance.calibration: grouping_params calibrated on 24 known wheel GT signatures (2026-07-23): ROI motion mean 0.0112~0.0276 -> floor 0.01; within-episode anchor->other dHash hamming max 7 -> threshold 7; within-episode motion-mean spread <=0.015 -> tolerance 0.02; cross-episode separated by <=10min time boundary. Frozen before fresh grouping; not tuned on fresh cohort.
provenance.note: owner 확인 전 production 계약 아님. shadow 전용 provisional ROI.
